title: RNA Integrity Check
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8h408","text":"RNA Integrity Check: Modification of Protocol from Qiagen","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"a1q4i","text":"Pretreat gel containers and gel flask with RNase Zap","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ra21","text":"Formamide and formaldehyde are toxic and dangerous chemicals.  Handle with care in the hood!","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Determine the concentration of RNA; ideally want to run approximately 1 µg of RNA on the gel (should be about 1 µL of your sample)
Spray gel tray, comb, damns, and a small flask with RNAse Zap.
For small gels, melt 0.3 grams of RNA ONLY agarose in 30 ml 1X TBE (or 1X TAE) to the cleaned flask (for a 1% gel using Horizon gel boxes. If using something else, adjust accordingly).
Let the solution cool slightly, add 1 µL, EtBr . Pour gel and let solidify.

For samples: RNA sample in a total of 8 µL of water (if RNA concentration is about 1 µg, /ml , add 1 µL of RNA to 7 µL of RNAse-free water) 4 µL of sample buffer Mix samples Sample Buffer (make FRESH!) 80 µL, of concentrated dye (80% glycerol, 0.2% bromophenol blue, 0.2% xylene cyanol; this does NOT need to be made fresh!) 500 µL, of formamide 120 µL, of 37% formaldehyde (1/10 of the recipe above is normally enough)
Load gel and include a 1 kb DNA ladder for size approximation; run at 100 volts about 45-60 minutes

Gel: should see 2 distinct bands corresponding to the 16s and 23s rRNA species. If RNA is intact, will not see smearing. Should also see lots of tRNA at the bottom . Formamide and formaldehyde are toxic and dangerous chemicals. Handle with care in the hood! On occasion, I have run a mini-1X MOPS gel to validate RNA integrity especially if I do not have much sample left and really needed to use the RNA for an important experiment.
creator: Eadewunm
